## Treatment Options Available

Most providers offer different levels of chemical peels:
- **Light/Superficial peels**:

citations.cited_text: Superficial Peels Superficial peels, also called lunchtime peels, use gentle acids to exfoliate the top layer of the skin. This type of peel is often ...

content.text: Use gentle acids to exfoliate the top layer of skin, often called "lunchtime peels," used to treat fine wrinkles, lines, and patchy skin tone
- **Medium peels**:

citations.cited_text: Medium Peels Medium peels use stronger acids to penetrate deeper into the skin and treat wrinkles, lines, scars, skin laxity, and uneven skin tone.
